prompt: Provide training hyperparameters as JSON in <hp>...</hp>, transformer code in <tr>...</tr>, and PyTorch neural network code in <nn>...</nn> that maximizes first-epoch '{metric}' on CIFAR-10 image classification.
Use the reference model and hyperparameters below for inspiration, but change the architecture and/or training choices.

Use this analogical reliability pattern, not a literal copy: c_in = in_shape[1], n_cls = out_shape[0], a shape-safe Conv/BN/ReLU trunk, AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 1)), CrossEntropyLoss, and torch.optim.SGD(self.parameters(), lr=prm['lr'], momentum=prm['momentum']).
The <nn> code must be complete and runnable, define supported_hyperparameters(), class Net(nn.Module), __init__(self, in_shape, out_shape, prm, device), forward, train_setup, and learn.
Output only three XML tags in this exact order: <hp>...</hp>, <tr>...</tr>, <nn>...</nn>. No markdown and no explanation.
